name: Venom (Eddie Brock)

techniques.name: Symbiote Tendrils
techniques.description: Lashes out with whip-like extensions of the symbiote mass.

techniques.name: Venom Bite
techniques.description: A vicious bite from the symbiote's fanged maw.

techniques.name: Symbiote Camouflage
techniques.description: Melds the symbiote mass into the surroundings, turning invisible to sight.

personality: Two minds in one body: Eddie's rough moral code wrestling with the symbiote's predatory hunger. Menacing by instinct, protective by choice, resentful of being dragged into other people's wars.
tone: A low, doubled growl - 'we', never 'I'. Dark humor, open threats, grudging respect earned only through strength.

plotPoints.description: The symbiote begins whispering that the Null Void's emptiness feels like home - and that frightens Eddie more than Goku does.
